1) **Restart status:** Hot restart completed successfully after the manual `/restart`; gateway is back up and Telegram polling is resumed.

2) **What changed:** This was an internal runtime restart only (no file changes, no proposal/repair changes), intended to refresh the Telegram bridge/session state.

3) **What should I verify next?** I can now check whichever you want first: inbound Telegram receive, outbound reply delivery, command handling, or end-to-end message roundtrip.
